original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 6 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH european_suppliers AS (
  SELECT 
    s_suppkey, s_name, s_address, s_phone, s_acctbal, s_comment, 
    n_name, n_nationkey
  FROM 
    supplier
    JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
  WHERE 
    region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
), 
min_supplycosts AS (
  SELECT 
    partsupp.ps_partkey, 
    MIN(partsupp.ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
  FROM 
    partsupp
    JOIN european_suppliers ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = european_suppliers.s_suppkey
    JOIN part ON partsupp.ps_partkey = part.p_partkey
  WHERE 
    part.p_size = 6 
    AND part.p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
  GROUP BY 
    partsupp.ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
  european_suppliers.s_acctbal, 
  european_suppliers.s_name, 
  european_suppliers.n_name, 
  part.p_partkey, 
  part.p_mfgr, 
  european_suppliers.s_address, 
  european_suppliers.s_phone, 
  european_suppliers.s_comment
FROM 
  part
  JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
  JOIN european_suppliers ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = european_suppliers.s_suppkey
  JOIN min_supplycosts ON 
      part.p_partkey = min_supplycosts.ps_partkey 
      AND partsupp.ps_supplycost = min_supplycosts.min_ps_supplycost
ORDER BY 
  european_suppliers.s_acctbal DESC, 
  european_suppliers.n_name, 
  european_suppliers.s_name, 
  part.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Eliminated the correlated subquery by precomputing the minimum supply cost for each part in Europe using a CTE
Created a CTE for European suppliers to avoid scanning supplier, nation, and region tables multiple times
Filtered parts by size and type early in the min_supplycosts CTE to reduce the number of rows processed
Removed redundant part filtering conditions in the main query as they are already applied in the min_supplycosts CTE
